subject: docs: clarify why Expo upgrade is a USER_ACTION (proxy limitation)
body:
Attempted npx expo install — fails because Expo CLI uses fetch()
internally which doesn't respect HTTPS_PROXY. Updated the entry
to explain the proxy limitation and that it needs a session with
direct network access, not that it's inherently manual.

Tags: documentation
